## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No hardcoded content strings in components (content lives in `lib/`)
- [ ] New images use `next/image` with a `sizes` prop
- [ ] No `.DS_Store` or `node_modules` accidentally staged
- [ ] Accessibility: interactive elements are keyboard-accessible and labelled
